title: GrowGeneration Reports Record Q1 2020 Revenues of $33.0 Million and Record Adjusted EBITDA of $2.7 Million
text: GrowGeneration Q1 2020 Record Results. Q1 2020 Record Performance: Revenue: $33.0 million (record for quarter). Adjusted EBITDA: $2.7 million (record). Strong growth driven by cannabis industry expansion and consumer gardening interest. Company benefited from increased demand for hydroponic supplies and growing equipment. Retail expansion progressed with new store openings. E-commerce growth accelerated. Gross margins healthy reflecting product mix. Management commentary highlighted strong market tailwinds and execution. Company raised full-year 2020 guidance multiple times throughout year reflecting consistent beat-and-raise pattern.
